Test Beta Windows Release

Files:
- TestBetaSetup.exe: installer build that places the app in a standard user-space install folder and can create shortcuts.
- TestBetaApp.exe: portable standalone desktop app build.

Controls:
- WASD move
- Mouse look
- Q / E backup turn
- Space or left click fire
- F fullscreen request inside the game
- F11 desktop-app fullscreen
- [ and ] tune mouse sensitivity
- R restart

Notes:
- The app includes embedded HTML/CSS/JS and does not depend on loose files beside the exe.
- The setup build installs without admin rights by default.
